title: MedieCraft - Server
description: Server-side mods for MedieCraft, a Medieval and Roguelike Minecraft experience
body:
![MedieCraftTitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cf4452d40db09f313a55b805980728c8c777cbd.png)

**This modpack has been created with the aim of rediscovering the game through an ultra-immersive, challenging world full of new things to discover throughout your adventure.**

**Roam the world, traverse biomes and worlds, fight monsters on the prowl, and explore structures and dungeons to make your armor and weapons. Forget boring mining sessions and prepare yourself for an unforgettable experience with your friends.**

**This modpack is very challenging by setting game difficulty to normal or hard. If you want to explore the world and chill, easy difficulty is recommended. Good luck if you want to play in hardcore. ;)**
_________________________

- 🐓 **New mobs and mob variants**
- 🍅 **More plants**
- 🏛 **Enhanced structures** and new ones
- 🛖 **Themed villages** and **structures** 
- ⛰️ **Beautiful landscapes** with new and **larger biomes** using Terralith and Tectonic
- ⚔️ **Dungeons**, **mobs**, **structures** to build your stuff using battles instead of mining
- 🎑 **Ultra immersive environment sounds and songs**
- 🪓 **Realistic trees**
- 🗡 **New tools and weapons**
- 🔦 **Dynamic Lights**
- 🎙 **Proximity chat** (with voice effects depending on the environment)
- 👹 **More monsters**
- 🌋 **Better Nether**
- 👁 **Better End**
- ⚡️ **Hyper fast and ultra optimized**
- 🔥 **Very challenging**


# **Compatibility**

✅ MedieCraft

✅ MedieCraft - Lite

✅ MedieCraft - Server

❌ MedieCraft - Cross-Platform

❌ MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform

❌ MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform

❌ MC Bedrock Clients

❌ MC Java Clients (using Fabric, ViaVersion, ViaFabric, CreativeCore and GeckoLib)

# **Key notes**
- **Server side modpack** (only players using [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) and [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) can join the server)
- See instructions to get your server up and running in minutes !
- The mod list is available by clicking on 'versions' and then on the version number you chose to install.
- If you want to save and quit the server, just type `stop` in the console.
- If you can't break anything or if want you or your friends to be able to do commands and cheats, you can type `op [player_name]` directly in the server console.

# **System Requirements**
**Minimal System Requirements**

- 4GB allocated to the server

- 4 Cores / 4-8 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 3 3100, Intel Core i5 7400)

- 8Gb RAM 

- 1,5GB SSD storage


**Recommended System Requirements**

- 6GB allocated to the server

- 6 Cores / 12 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 5 5600, Intel Core i5 12400F)

- 16GB RAM

- 1,5GB SSD storage

# **Instructions**

1. Download [Fabric Server](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/) and chose the version of the loader according to the version of MedieCraft - Server and MedieCraft you want. (Example: if you are playing in 1.21, download both MedieCraft and MedieCraft - Server compatible for 1.21 **AND** [Fabric Server](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/) for 1.21)
2. Launch it using the command named `Launch Command` on [Fabric Server Website](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/). **NB: change the number `2` in `-Xmx2G` command and put how much RAM you want to allocate to the server (Example: if you want 6GB for your server, write `-Xmx6G`).**
3. Close server console by typing `stop`.
3. Accept EULA by replacing `false` to `true` in the file : `eula.txt`.
4. On Modrinth, go to your library and click on this modpack. Click on `Folder` to access the modpack's folder.
5. Copy the `mods` folder and paste it into the server folder (it should replace the empty `mods` folder previously created by Fabric)
6. Restart the server using the same command.
7. Your server is up and running! (If you are running the server on your computer, you may have to forward your ports but it can be dangerous so be careful!). 

**NB: If you don't want to forward your ports, you can use Essential mod, add your friends and invite them into your solo worlds!**


# **Q&A**

- **Is this modpack compatible with both [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) and [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) ?** 

Absolutely, using this modpack you can join servers using both [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) and [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite).

- **How much RAM should I allocate to this modpack profile ?**

4GB minimum should be fine. But 6 to 8GB is recommended if there are a lot of players or if all players are using [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) with [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons).

- **Can I play this modpack in older versions of Minecraft ?**

Yes, to be able to play in older versions, you have to unlink the modpack at the very bottom of the modpack options. Then change the version of Minecraft and update all mods by clicking on 'update mods'. Start the game and it should launch if all mods are compatible with the selected version of Minecraft.

- **Is this modpack Cross-Platform ?**

No, but I recreated this modpack with only Cross-Platform mods. See [MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server-cross-platform).

- **Can I use this server modpack with a client running [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) ?** 

No, you can only play with [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) and [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) modpacks only.



# **Credits**
💙 Huge thanks to Maffhew with his Excalibur resource pack for giving me the idea of creating this resource pack. I honored him by putting his resource pack icon to my modpack ! The resource pack is in this modpack !
